headline: Roper Technologies schedules second quarter 2026 financial results conference call
summary: SARASOTA, Fla., July 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Roper Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROP) announced that its financial results for the second quarter of 2026, ended June 30, 2026, will be released before the market opens on Thursday, July 23, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results has been scheduled for 8:00 AM ET on Thursday, July 23, 2026. The call can be accessed via webcast or by dialing +1 800-836-8184 (US/Canada) or +1 646-357-8785, using conference call ID 70538. Webcast informat

headline: Roche (SWX:ROP) Launches AXELIOS 1 As Enspryng Review And Excalipoint Deal Expand Reach
summary: Roche Holding (SWX:ROP) received FDA priority review for Enspryng (satralizumab) in thyroid eye disease, highlighting a potential at-home treatment option for patients. The company introduced its AXELIOS 1 sequencing platform, adding a new entrant to next generation sequencing tools used in research and diagnostics. Roche entered a clinical collaboration with Excalipoint Therapeutics focused on multi-targeted immuno-oncology approaches. Roche Holding, a major player in biopharma and...
